items.label: Development Complete — Schemas
messages: Now let me look at the existing schemas package to understand the patterns:
Let me look at the actual schema source files:
I have a clear picture of the existing patterns. Now I'll implement the schemas.  **Intent: Creating task schemas**
Now add comprehensive tests for the task schemas:
Now let me build and run tests:
Build succeeded. Now run the tests:
All 74 tests pass (including the 44 new task schema tests). Build and tests both succeed. Let me verify the final state of the files:
Now let me run the post-change review and syntax check:

Review shows: - **No breaking changes** — purely additive (new schemas + barrel exports) - **Minimal structural impact** (1% footprint) - **No syntax errors** - **Risk: MODERATE (49/100)** — due to novelty score (new schemas), which is expected  Now let me commit and mark the pipeline as complete:
Commit successful. Now mark the pipeline phase as complete:

All done. Here's a summary of what was implemented:  ## Schema-Dev Completion Summary  ### Files Created | File | Description | |---|---| | `packages/schemas/src/tasks.ts` | Task board Zod schemas — `TaskStatusSchema`, `TaskSchema`, `CreateTaskSchema`, `UpdateTaskStatusSchema` with inferred TypeScript types | | `packages/schemas/src/__tests__/tasks.test.ts` | 44 round-trip parse tests covering valid inputs, invalid inputs, boundary conditions, and field stripping |  ### Files Modified | File | Change | |---|---| | `packages/schemas/src/index.ts` | Added barrel exports for all 4 task schemas and 4 inferred types |  ### Schema Details - **`TaskStatusSchema`** — `z.enum(["TODO", "IN_PROGRESS", "DONE"])` — the three Kanban columns - **`TaskSchema`** — Full task entity: `id` (UUID), `workspaceId`, `title` (1–200 chars), `status`, `createdAt`/`updatedAt` (ISO-8601 datetimes) - **`CreateTaskSchema`** — Client input for POST: `title` only (1–200 chars, with custom validation messages). `workspaceId` is injected server-side. - **`UpdateTaskStatusSchema`** — Client input for PATCH: `status` only  ### Quality Gates ✅ - **Build:** `tsc` compiles cleanly with zero errors - **Tests:** 74/74 pass (30 existing + 44 new task schema tests) - **Roam review:** No breaking changes, minimal structural impact, no syntax errors - **Zod version:** v3 (`^3.24.0`) matching existing dependency — not v4

shellCommands.command: cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && bash tools/autonomous-factory/agent-commit.sh backend "feat(schemas): add TaskStatus, Task, CreateTask, UpdateTaskStatus Zod schemas for kanban-task-board" 2>&1
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/sample-app && npm run pipeline:complete kanban-task-board schema-dev 2>&1
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && bash tools/autonomous-factory/agent-commit.sh pipeline "chore(pipeline): mark Development Complete — Schemas" 2>&1

items.label: Infrastructure Written — Terraform
messages: Now let me check the existing hooks and also the OpenAPI spec for APIM patterns:
Now let me check if the webhook-dispatcher branch modified the same OpenAPI file:

Now I have the full picture. Let me create the infrastructure. I need to: 1. Create `cosmos.tf` with Cosmos DB account, database, Tasks container, and RBAC (prerequisite branch not yet merged) 2. Update the OpenAPI spec with task endpoints 3. Update the validate-infra hook
Now update the OpenAPI spec with the task endpoints:
Now update the validate-infra hook with a Cosmos DB reachability check:
Now let me run the Terraform validation gate:
Terraform validate passed. Now run the plan:

shellCommands.command: cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && git log --oneline feature/webhook-dispatcher -- apps/sample-app/infra/cosmos.tf 2>/dev/null | head -5
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && git diff main..feature/webhook-dispatcher -- apps/sample-app/infra/main.tf 2>/dev/null | head -60
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/sample-app/infra && az account show > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo "✅ Azure CLI authenticated" || echo "❌ Not authenticated"
grep -E "(will be created|will be updated|to add|to change|to destroy)" /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/sample-app/infra/plan-output.txt
